data.title: HTTPS with TLS Encryption
data.description: Protects data integrity and privacy by encrypting data in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 protocol with strong cipher suites.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances security by requiring multiple forms of verification from users.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through third-party services like Google Authenticator.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine and thorough audits to identify and mitigate security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning using tools like OWASP ZAP paired with manual reviews.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against various web-based attacks like SQL injection and cross-site scripting.
data.technical_spec: Integrated via a WAF solution like AWS Shield.

data.title: Data Backups and Recovery
data.description: Regular backups and redundancy to ensure data is not lost and can be quickly recovered.
data.technical_spec: Automated backup process using AWS Backup and RDS snapshots.
